qText: Three numbers are in the ratio 4 : 5 : 7. If their average is 480, what is the difference between the largest and the smallest number ?

There are 2 consecutive even numbers and 3 consecutive odd numbers. The average of the even numbers is 3 more than the average of the odd numbers. If the sum of the even numbers is 2 more than the sum of the odd numbers, find the average of the odd numbers.

The average of 15 numbers is 80. The average of the first six numbers is 70. The average of the next six numbers is 20% more than the average of the first six numbers. The 13th number is 4 less than the 15th number, and the 14th number is 4 greater than the 15th number. What is the average of the 13th and 14th numbers?

There are four consecutive odd numbers, denoted as a ^1 , a ^2 , a ^3 , and a ^4 , and three consecutive even numbers, represented by b ^1 , b ^2 , and b ^3 . The average of the four odd numbers is 4 less than the average of the three even numbers. Also, the sum of the three even numbers is 6 less than the sum of the four odd numbers.What is the average of a ^1 , a ^2 , a ^3 , and a ^4 ?
The average of 6 numbers is 30. The average of the first four numbers is 25, and the fifth number is 35. What is the sixth number?
The average of 7 numbers is 85. Six of the numbers are 60, 25, 15, 35, 10 and 24. Find the missing number.
A park has an average number of 420 visitors on Sunday and 120 on other days. The average number of visitors per day in a month of 30 days beginning with Sunday, is:
Which of the following is true about average ?
optText: ‚Äã(a) The average of six consecutive even‚Äã ‚Äãintegers is an even natural number‚Äã
‚Äã(b) The average of six consecutive odd‚Äã ‚Äãintegers is an odd integer.‚Äã
‚Äã(c) The average of six consecutive odd‚Äã ‚Äãintegers is an even integer.‚Äã
‚Äã(d) The average of six consecutive odd‚Äã ‚Äãintegers is an odd natural number.‚Äã

qText: The average weight of a certain number of apples in a basket was 0.5 kg. If 10 apples with an average weight of 0.7 kg are removed from the basket and 5 apples with an average weight of 0.6 kg are added to the basket, then the average weight of the apples in the basket decreases by 0.1 kg. What was the initial number of apples in the basket ?

In the first 5 overs of a T-20 international cricket match, the run rate was only 5.6. What should be the run rate (approximately) in the remaining 15 overs to reach a target of 185 runs?

A stock portfolio consists of four stocks. Stock A represents 20% of the portfolio and has a return of 6%. Stock B represents 30% of the portfolio and has a return of 8%. Stock C represents 20% of the portfolio and has a return of 4%. Stock D represents the remaining 30% of the portfolio and has a negative-return of 5%. What is the average return of the portfolio?

In a class with a certain number of students, if one student weighing 30 kg is added, then the average weight of the class increases by 1 kg. If one more student weighing 30 kg is added, then the average weight of the class increases by 1.5 kg over the original average. What is the original average weight (in kg) of the class ?

Rajender is working as a delivery boy in a multinational company. The company is paying him ‚Çπ90 per delivery. In a fortnight comprising 15 consecutive working days, his average earnings per day was ‚Çπ540. If his average earnings of the first 7 days was ‚Çπ519 per day and that of the last 7 days was ‚Çπ546 per day, then at was his earning on the 8th day of the fortnight?

The average weight of a group of 12 children is 66 kg. If 2 children, X and Y, replace A and B, the new average weight becomes 65 kg. The weight of A= weight of B and the weight of X = weight of Y. Another child, C, is included in the group, and the new average weight remains 65 kg. Weight of C= weight of X. Find the weight of A.

Sudesh is the owner of a multipurpose shop. For a specific month, his profits are detailed below. Category Profit earned in ‚Çπ Groceries 50,000 Cosmetics 20,000 Ladies' dresses 10,000 In order to estimate the expected profit for the next month, he assigns the weights of 6, 5 and 8 to the different categories in the same order. What will be the weighted average of his profits?

During a school excursion each student of junior school was charged ‚Çπ325 and each student of senior school was charged ‚Çπ400. If there were 80 students from junior school and the combined average amount charged per student was ‚Çπ352, then how many students from senior school went for the excursion?
In ‚Çπ150, B buys 10 pens for ‚Çπ8 each, 10 erasers for ‚Çπ5 each and some sharpeners for ‚Çπ4 each. What is the average price per item in ‚Çπ?
20 students of a college went to a hotel. 19 of them spent ‚Çπ175 each on their meal and the 20 ^th student spent ‚Çπ19 more than the average of all the 20. Find the total money spent by them.

The average score in a test for 50 students is 44. Out of the total students, 40% of the students are girls and the rest are boys. The average score of boys is 20% less than that of girls. What is the average score of girls?

A is the average of 10 given numbers. B is the average after 2 of the numbers were replaced by 3 other different numbers. The average of the removed numbers is 48 and the average of the newly included numbers is 56. If A + B = 438, then the value of A - B is:

The average of 8 numbers is 44. The average of the first three numbers is 50 and the average of the next two numbers is 52. If the sixth number is 6 and 8 less than the seventh and eighth number respectively, then what is the value of the eighth number?
Eleven friends spent Rs. 18 each on a tour and the twelfth friend spent Rs. 11 less than the average expenditure of all twelve of them. What is the total money spent by twelve friends

Sonali applied for a job of Science teacher in a school. In the test for job, she scored 8 in physics, 8 in chemistry, 6 in biology, and 6.5 in the interview. For calculating the final score, weightage of 2, 3, 3, and 4 were assigned to Physics, Chemistry, Biology and interview, respectively. What is the weighted average score of Sonali ?

The batting average for 27 innings of a cricket player is 47 runs. His highest score in an innings exceeds his lowest score by 157 runs. If these two innings are excluded, the average score of the remaining 25 innings is 42 runs. Find his highest score in an innings.
In an office, 80% workers are men while 20% are women. The average age of the men is 30 and the average age of the women is 40. What is the average age of all the workers in that office?
The average age of a husband and his wife 3 years ago was 39 years. The average age of the husband, wife and their child 2 years hence will be 34 years. Find the present age of the child.

In a family of six males and a few females, the average monthly consumption of grain head is 14.4 kg. If the average monthly consumption per head is 20 kg in the case of males and 6 kg in the case of females. Find the number of females in the family?

A is the average marks of a group of 10 students in a class and A + 8 is the average of a group of 15 students which includes the group of 10 students as given. The total marks obtained by the group of 10 students is X and the total marks obtained by the group of 15 students is Y. If X : Y = 3 : 5, then the value of A + X + Y is _________.

A retailer opens her outlet on all seven days of the week. It is observed that her average sales for Saturdays and Sundays combined is 300, and 200 ‚Çπ ‚Çπ for the remaining five days combined. For a month starting on saturday, it was found that the total sales were 7,000. ‚Çπ Which among the following months it could be
Consider ten consecutive odd numbers starting from 5. Multiply each of them, except the first and the second, with three. What will be the average of the ten numbers so formed?
What is the average of numbers from 1 to 50 which are multiples of 2 or 5? (correct to one decimal place)

The average weight of students of section A and B having 40 students each is 45.5 kg and 44.2 kg respectively. Two students of section A having average weight 48.75 kg were shifted to B and 2 students of section B were shifted to section A, making the average weight of both the sections equal. What is the average weight (in kg) of the students who were shifted from section B to section A?

In an examination, the average score of a student was 67.6. If he would have got 27 more marks in Mathematics, 10 more marks in Computer Science, 18 more marks in History and retained the same marks in other subjects, then his average score would have been 72.6. How many papers were there in the examination?

The average monthly salary of 60 employees of a factory is Rs.29900. If two officers are getting Rs.90,000 each and the average salary of 8 supervisors is Rs.65,000, then what is the average salary (in Rs.) of the remaining employees?
What is the ratio of the average of first eight prime numbers to the average of first ten even natural numbers?

x, y and z are three positive 4 numbers such that y is times of x and 5 5 z is times of y. If the average of 8 reciprocals of the numbers x, y and z is 17 , then the average of 3 times of x 240 and 5 times of y will be:

The numbers 2, 3, 4 and 5 occur (2 + 5k), (5k - 7), (2k - 3) and (k + 2) times, respectively. The average of the number is 2.85. Later on, the number 2 was replaced by 6 in all the places. What is the average of the new numbers?
If the average of the 3-digit numbers 335, 2x5, x35, 63x and 406 is 411, then what will be the average of (x - 1), (x - 3), (x + 3) and (x + 5) ?

The average of the numbers a, b, c and d is 2d + 4, Also, the averages of the numbers a and b, b and c, c and d are 8, 5 and 4, respectively. If e = a + d + 1, then what is the average of the numbers d and e ?

The average of four consecutive odd natural numbers is eight less than the average of three consecutive even natural numbers. If the sum of these even numbers is equal to the sum of above four odd numbers, then the average of four original odd numbers is:
The average of nine 2 digit numbers is decreased by 6 when the digits of one of the 2 digit numbers is interchanged. Find the difference between the digits of that number.

The numbers 24, 45, a, 35, 59, 83, 46, b, 29, 74 are serially numbered as they appear in the sequence. When each number is added to its serial number, then the average of the new numbers formed is 55. The average of the missing numbers (a and b) is:

The average of 35 consecutive natural numbers is N. Dropping the first 10 numbers and including the next 10 numbers, the average is changed to M. If 2 2 the value of M - N = 600, then the average of 3M and 5N is:
A batsman in his 11th innings makes a score of 77 runs, thereby increasing his average scores by 3. What is his average score after the 11th innings?
The average age of husband, wife and child 7 years ago was 42 years and that of wife and child 9 years ago was 36 years. The present age of the husband is:

The average age of 120 students in a group is 13.56 years, 35% of the number of students are girls and the rest are boys. If the ratio of the average age of boys and girls is 6:5, then what is the average age (in years) of the girls?
The average of 18 numbers is 37.5. If six numbers of average x are added to them, then the average of all the numbers increases by one. The value of x is : :

The average weight of a certain number of students in a group is 72 kg. If 10 students having an average weight of 78 kg leave and 4 students having an average weight of 80 kg join the group, the average weight of the students in the group decreases by 0.7 kg. The number of students initially in the group is

The average of 33 numbers is 74. The average of the first 17 numbers is 72.8 and that of the last 17 numbers is 77.2. If the 17th number is excluded, then what will be the average of the remaining numbers (correct to one decimal place)?

The owner of a bike buys petrol at the rate of Rs. 64, Rs. 80 and Rs. 320 per litre for three consecutive years. If he spends Rs. 32000 on petrol every year, then what is the average price (Rs.) of petrol per litre ?

An art exhibition was held in the month of November. The numbers of visitors on weekdays and on weekends were 450 and 750 respectively. If the first day of the month was Monday, then what was the average number of visitors in the month ?

A person was asked to guess his own weight. He estimated his weight to be over 70 kg but less than 80 kg. His friend estimated his weight to be more than 74 kg but less than 84 kg. His mother said that his weight is less than 78 kg. Assuming that the weights are a whole number and that the three had correctly guessed, then what is the average of the possible weights(in Kg)?
Out of four numbers the average of the first three is 16 and that of the last three is 15. If the last number is 21 then the first number is:
The average of all the prime and composite numbers upto 100 is:
What is the average of the first 15 whole numbers?
What is the average of the first 8 multiples of 6 among the natural numbers?
The average of a and b is 36. The average of b and c is 42. What is the difference between c and a ?
The average of 1088 real numbers is zero. At most how many of them can be negative?
The difference between the average of first ten prime numbers and the first ten prime numbers of two digits is:
The average of the first 101 ______ numbers is equal to 102.
The average of the first 1234 _______ numbers is equal to 1234.
The average of a number and its reciprocal is 4. The average of its cube and cube of its reciprocal is equal to:

10 years ago, the average age of a family of five members was 38 years. Now, two new members join, whose age difference is 8 years. If the present average age of the family is the same as it was 10 years ago, what is the age (in years) of the new younger member?
The average of n number is 36. If each of 75% of the numbers is increased by 6 and each of the remaining numbers is decreased by 9, then the new average of the numbers is:

The average weight of the students in a group was 75.4 kg. Later on, four students having weights, 72.9 kg, 73.8 kg, 79.5 kg and 87.4 kg joined the group. As a result, the average weight of all the students in the group increased by 0.24 kg. What was the number of students in the group, initially ?

In a class of 80 students, 60% participate in games and the rest do not. The average weight of the former group is 5% more than that of the latter. If the average weight of all the students is 51 1 kg, then what is the average weight (in 2 kg) of the former group?
The average of 27 numbers is zero. Out of them, how many may be greater than zero, at the most?
The average marks of 40 students was found to be 68. If the marks of two students were incorrectly entered as 48 and 64 instead of 84 and 46 respectively, then what is the correct average?

Four different positive numbers are written in ascending order. One-third of the average of all the four numbers is 19 less than the greatest of these numbers. If the average of the first three numbers is 12, the greatest number among the given numbers is:

The total number of students in section A and B of a class is 110. The number of students in section A is 10 more than that of section B. The average score of the students in B, in a test, is 20% more than that of students in A. If the average score of all the students in the class is 72, then what is the average score of the students in A?
Three numbers are such that if the average of any two of them is added to the third number, the sums obtained are 168, 174 and 180 respectively. What is the average of the original three numbers?

The average of 15 numbers is 80. The average of the first 6 numbers is 72. The average of the next 6 numbers is 33.33 % more than the average of the first 6 numbers. The 13th number is 8 more than the 15th number, and the 14th number is 10 less than the 15th number. What is the average of the 13th and 14th numbers ?
What is the average of all integers between 100 and 252 that are exactly divisible by 11 ?

In a team of 85 employees, the average monthly sales per employee is ‚Çπ 2.8 lakh. If 30 junior employees average ‚Çπ 1.2 lakh each, what is the average monthly sales figure (in ‚Çπ lakh) for the senior employees ?
The average ages of three groups of artisans are 18, 30, and 22. If the ratio of the number of artisans in the three groups is 3 : 2 : 5, what is the overall average age ?
The average of 21 numbers is 69. If the average of the first ten is 66 and the average of the last ten is 72, find the 11th number.
What is the average of all integers between 200 and 350 that are exactly divisible by 13 ?
A batsman's average score for a certain number of innings is 66 . If he scores 144 runs in the next innings, his average becomes 72. How many innings did he play earlier?
The average salary of 12 employees is ‚Çπ20,000. The average salary of 4 senior staff is ‚Çπ30,000. What is the average salary for the other employees?
A cricketer's average in 9 innings is 55. If his highest score is excluded, the average drops to 50. What is his highest score?
Three numbers are such that when the average of any two of them is added to the third, the results obtained are 210, 192, and 174 , respectively. What is the average of the original three numbers ?
The average age of 30 students in a class is 15 years. When a new student is admitted, the average increases by 0.3 years. What is the age of the new student?
The monthly average salary for 9 employees plus one supervisor is ‚Çπ12,000. If the supervisor earns ‚Çπ30,000, what is the average salary of the 8 employees?

A company has 60 employees, of whom 45 % are women. The average monthly salary of the women is ‚Çπ60,000, while that of the men is ‚Çπ78,000. What is the overall average monthly salary (in ‚Çπ000) of the whole workforce?
What is the average of all three - digit numbers divisible by 19 ?
The average weight of 13 people is 65 kg. If one person leaves and the new average becomes 65.5 kg, what is the weight of the person who left?
What is the average of all numbers between 1000 and 1500 that are divisible by 20 ?

The overall average salary for all employees in an office is ‚Çπ32,000. Officers earn an average salary of ‚Çπ56,000, while non-officers make an average of ‚Çπ20,000. If there are 17officers, determine the number of non-officers.
Three numbers are such that when the sum of any two of them is added to half of the third, the results are 225, 213, and 192 respectively. What is the average of the three numbers ?
The average of 8 numbers is 56. When one number is removed, the average becomes 54. What number was removed?
The average age of a committee of 8 members increases by 4 years when two women aged 34 and 44 years are replaced by two men. What is the average age of these two men ?

There are 5 consecutive integers and 4 consecutive integers. The average of the 5 integers is 2 less than the average of the 4 integers. The sum of the 4 integers is 2 more than the sum of the 5 integers. Find the average of the 5 integers.
The average age of 21 students is 17 years. A teacher joins the group, and the average becomes 20 years. What is the teacher's age?
The average salary of a team of 90 employees is ‚Çπ58,000. If the average salary of 40 of them is ‚Çπ68,000, what is the average salary of the remaining employees?
The average weight of 40 students is 70 kg. If one student is removed, the average drops to 69.5 kg. What is the weight of the removed student ?

In a group of 30 boys, the average height was initially determined to be 150 cm. However, it was later discovered that the height of one boy was incorrectly recorded as 154 cm when it should have been 145 cm. Calculate the accurate average height.
The average of a group of 8 consecutive even numbers is 43. What is the sum of the smallest and largest numbers in the group ?
Three numbers are in the ratio 6 : 9 : 5. If their average is 300, what is the difference between the largest and the smallest number?
The average of a group of 9 numbers is 51. If the first four numbers have an average of 47 and the last four numbers have an average of 55, what is the fifth number ?

A chemist prepares 80 liters of antiseptic solution by mixing two liquids 'A' and 'B' in the ratio 3 : 5. If the cost of 'A' is Rs. 55/liter and 'B' is Rs. 40/liter, what is the approximate average cost per liter of the final solution ?
The average weight of 12 boxes is 18 kg. If the heaviest box weighs 24 kg and the lightest weighs 12 kg, what is the average weight of the remaining boxes?
The average of x and y is 60 . The average of x, y, and z is 80. What is the average of x, y, and 2z ?
The average salary of 20 workers in a factory is Rs. 48 ,000. If the salary of a supervisor is added, the average rises to Rs. 49,500. What is the supervisor's salary?

A trader bought 5 varieties of rice whose weights are in the ratio 3 : 4 : 5 : 6 : 7. Their respective prices per kg are Rs. 42, Rs. 45, Rs. 47, Rs. 48, and Rs. 50. What is the average cost per kg of the mixture ?
The average marks of 40 students in a class is 72. If the marks of one student were wrongly entered as 92 instead of 72, what is the CORRECT average?
The average of a certain number of quantities is 38. If 7 is added to each quantity, what will be the new average?
A group of 6 friends went to a cafe. If 5 of them paid Rs. 250 each and the sixth paid Rs. x, the average bill per person came out to be Rs. 270. What is the value of x ?
A group of 5 students went on a trip and spent Rs. 1000 in total. If one of them spent Rs. 400 while the rest spent equally, what was the average spending of the other 4 students?
A student took 6 tests and had an average of 52. If his average after 7 tests increased to 63, what was his score on the 7th test?
The average of 6 different numbers is 120. If the smallest number is 18, what is the average of the remaining five numbers ?
The average score of 50 students in a test is 136. The top 5 scorers had an average of 160, and the lowest 5 had an average of 100. What is the average of the remaining 40 students ?
A cricketer has played 10 innings with an average score of 50. In the next inning, he scores 110. What will be the new average ?
In a company, the average salary of 3 junior employees is Rs. 25,000, and that of 2 senior employees is Rs. 50,000. What is the combined average salary ?

The average monthly salary of 10 employees in a company's IT department is ‚Çπ45,000. If two new employees join the department, the total number of employees increases to 12 and the average salary becomes ‚Çπ46,500. What is the average salary of the two new employees who join ?
The average marks of 12 students is 85. When one student is removed, the average marks of the remaining 11 students become 82. What was the mark of the removed student ?
The average of 15 results is 80. If the top two results are excluded, the average becomes 78 . What is the average of the top two results?
The average of three numbers is 44. The first number is 25 % more than the second, and the third is 25% less than the second. What is the second number?
If the average of eight numbers is 60 and the average of the first five numbers is 51, what is the average of the last three numbers?
An investor tracks 6 stocks. Five of them have an average return of 7%. If the overall average return is 10%, what was the return on the sixth stock?
The average score of a batsman in 20 innings is 43. If his highest score of 115 is excluded, what is the new average?
The average of 10 numbers is 64. If two of them are removed and the new average becomes 62, what is the average of the two removed numbers ?
A class of 50 students has an average score of 65. If 10 new students are added and the class average decreases by 1, what is the average score of the 10 new students ?
The average age of 5 students in a class increases by 2 years when a 40-year-old teacher joins them. What was the original average age of the students?
The average temperature of a city from Monday to Friday is 30¬∞ C. If the temperature on Saturday is 55¬∞ C, what will be the average temperature from Monday to Saturday ?
The average of a certain number of quantities is 48. If 6 is added to each quantity, what will be the new average ?
A group of 7 students went on a trip and spent Rs. 2500 in total. If one of them spent Rs. 700 while the rest spent equally, what was the average spending of the other 6 students ?
Three classes have average ages 16, 18, and 21 respectively. The number of students in the three classes is in the ratio 3 : 4 : 5. What is the overall average age of all the students together ?
The average weight of 5 students is 48 kg. If one more student weighs 60 kg. What's the new average weight after the student joins?''
The average of a set of 10 numbers is 45. If one number, 60, is replaced by 30, what is the new average?
Find the average of 18, 28, 38, 48, and 58.

A student scores 72%, 68%, and 85% in three subjects. What is the average percentage?
Find the average of the first n even natural numbers.
The average of six numbers is 45. If one number is removed, the average becomes 42. What is the removed number?
Find the average of 6, 12, 18, 24.
The average marks of boys in a class is 60, and for girls, it's 80. If there are 10 girls and 40 boys, what is the average marks of the whole class?

The average of three numbers P, Q, and R is 52. The average of P and Q is 50. The average of Q and R is 54. What is the value of Q?
The average age of 4 members of a family is 25 years. If a new member joins the family, the average age becomes 24 years. What is the age of the new member?
The average age of 6 friends is 20 years. If two new friends join the group, with one aged 22 years and another aged 28 years, what will be the new average age of the expanded group?
The average weight of 12 boxes is 3 kg. If a box weighing 4 kg is replaced by a new box , the average weight becomes 3.1 kg. What is the weight of the new box ?

A shopkeeper has a sale of Rs. 5200, Rs. 6100, Rs. 5800, and Rs. 6400 for 4 consecutive months. How much sale must he have in the fifth month so that he gets an average sale of Rs. 6000 ?
The average weight of 25 boys travelling to Jammu is 32. If an fat boy with weight 80 kg join them. What will be the average weight of the group travelling to Jammu ?
The average weight of 10 students was calculated as 48 kg. Later, it was discovered that one student's weight was wrongly read as 35 kg instead of 55 kg. What is the correct average weight?

Average score of a batsman in 15 innings is 40. How many runs must he score in the 16th innings to raise his average to 42?
Average of 11 numbers is 40 Average of first 5 is 38 and last 5 is 42. Find the 6th number.

A student took 6 tests and had an average of 62. If his average after 7 tests increased to 73, what was his score on the 7th test ?
